channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dangerous junction, 31st May
item.description:
Cars coming from the left in photo, approaching to right have no idea that signals have gone red to cars and green to public, when cars have passed the last traffic light which is some 50yards away. All the cars shown in this photo have no idea it’s now green for the crossing but actually red for them. The area in question should actually be a yellow hatched box. A collision happened today where a person was hit by a car.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saint Margaret's Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Light head is facing wrong direction

item.title: Hole in road, noticed it today, 31st May
item.description:
Between number 50 and 52
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Netherwood Gardens, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 trees sunrise ave, 31st May
item.description:
4 trees along Sunrise ave, outside number 41 - 49. Trees have not been maintained, obstruction when trying to get out of cars when parked, visibility on a corner of a road and blocking young children on pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Sunrise Avenue, Bishop's Cleeve, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Following RTC early hrs Sunday morning, 31st May
item.description:
Between no 5 and 7 Crown Drive and No 03 and 02 Crown Drive were offending car landed on its roof after it had hit a stationary car at force as car this ended up on pavement Alot was swept up just make sure as it was alot of glass car parts and wheel,
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crown Drive, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is overgrown with dead limbs likely to fall off into the road/pavement ans peoples property in windy weather., 31st May
item.description:
Outside 213 Old Bath Road. Growing on pavememt beside the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 213, Old Bath Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Completely overgrown grass verges making visibility zero round 2 corners, 31st May
item.description:
Along gotherington lane directly between bishops cleeve and gotherington, outside the new Hayfield Heights estate.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cleeve Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury

item.title: Cracking arouns manhole cover, 31st May

item.title: Kerb stones missing, removed or broken, 31st May
item.description:
Kerb stones missing, removed or broken in many places along the pedestrian/cycle path.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cleeve Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury

item.title: Skip bag fly tipped, 31st May
item.description:
Large skip bag on Access road next to 127
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 127, Alstone Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street needs a desperate clean, pavement & road, 31st May
item.description:
I have phoned CBC several times in the last 18 months, told to contact GCC & told its CBC; no response & progress. Steve Skeleton does not return calls.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56, Alstone Avenue, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign faded not easily visible., 31st May
item.description:
This sign needs replacing as you can see it is badly faded so visibility is not great especially in different light conditions. Please get this replaced asap and feel it lead to incorrect speed on the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): B4632, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Pavement permanently inaccessible due to it being used for storage, 31st May

Hamilton St at junction of London Rd.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Hamilton Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: Large pot hole on footpath, 31st May
item.description:
In the foot path at end of Marten Close, Abbeymead

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marten Close, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath access blocked by gate operated by livery yard, 31st May
item.description:
Footpath access is completely blocked on the section that runs through the livery yard (Church lane / cowlsmead intersection in Shurdington, Gloucestershire) by white gated entry only and does not open for members of the public. By chance, spoke with a woman 31/05/26 assumed associated with the livery yard (who drove in when gate opened for her) who confirmed foot path was not closed but there was an alternative route. This had been a long-prolonged issue spanning many months. Alternative route does not offer explanation why footpath running through the livery yard has been deliberately restricted.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Lane, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen tree blocking bridleway., 31st May
item.description:
Bridleway blocked approx 100m from Limekilns junction of paths. Obstruction is passable with care for walkers with good mobility but probably not passable for those with restricted mobility, horses or bicycles.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Standard Gauge Incline, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The bus stop was knocked over a long time ago and has never been replaced, 31st May
item.description:
The bus stop opposite Southern Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Bath Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Surely this whole road is next on the list?, 31st May
item.description:
I’m amazed it’s got this bad.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 90, Rowanfield Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
